title: Remove Capital Return (CR) from Output Values

requirements.summary: Remove the Capital Return (CR) output card and all CR-specific state/extraction from the Output Values calculation flow so only Buy/Target price outputs are shown.
acceptanceCriteria: After clicking "Calculate Buy & Target price", the UI shows the Buy and Target price cards but does not show any "Capital Return (CR)" section/card.
Results calculation continues to work without runtime errors or TypeScript build errors (no unused imports/state related to Capital Return remain in ResultsSection).
The app no longer computes or stores Capital Return values as part of the calculate action (i.e., remove the CR-specific state and formula extraction used only for that removed section).

file_operations.description: Remove Capital Return UI rendering and related CR-specific state (CapitalReturnValues/crValues) from ResultsSection; remove CapitalReturnSection and calculateAllFormulas imports; update the calculate handler to only compute and store intrinsic/actual values and continue rendering only BuyTargetPriceCards after calculation.
